summary: The Optimism receipt import divergence is a semicolon-only rustfmt change in the break taken after reaching the desired height; no receipt import behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 208: M	crates/optimism/cli/src/commands/import_receipts.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `break` to `break;` after the highest receipts block reaches the highest transactions block.
No receipt chunk reading, import height handling, warning, or loop control behavior changed.
